items.title: Bank of America resets AMD stock price target on deal with Meta
items.description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock has lost about 18% in the past month, at the time of writing, Wednesday afternoon, Feb. 25, according to Yahoo Finance. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index (SPY) is up about 0.4% in the same period. The stock crashed following its Q4 earnings report on February ...

items.title: Dow Jones And U.S. Index Outlook: Nasdaq And Tech Lead A Market Rebound
An AI ETF Soared 28% And Left QQQ In The Dust
items.description: Investors seeking dedicated AI exposure face a structural problem: the biggest AI beneficiaries aren’t always the household names dominating broad tech indexes. iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (NYSEARCA:ARTY) addresses this by constructing a portfolio around the full AI infrastructure stack, from memory chips to data platforms to power infrastructure, rather than simply reweighting toward ... An AI ETF Soared 28% And Left QQQ In The Dust
